case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. BLAIR GRIFFIN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, BLAIR AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-18-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, BLAIR AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-28-2009
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, BLAIR AN INDIVIDUAL $5,102.73 PRINCIPAL, $532.63 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,875.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED DEC-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, BLAIR AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-10-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
